KXCPI-26MAY-T0.4.reason: Historical MoM CPI prints often land 0.2-0.4%; tariff pressures in 2026 push higher but 79c market feels rich given base rate uncertainty.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.5.reason: A >0.5% print requires sustained tariff pass-through and shelter persistence; possible but market slightly overprices given recent trend.
